title: hedysarum hedysaroides subsp. tschuktschorum
intro: Hedysarum hedysaroides subsp. tschuktschorum, also known as Tschuktschorum Hedysarum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In traditional medicine, it is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction for its medicinal uses.
